keyEvents.text: Rudy Muñoz (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Panama 0, Guatemala 1. Óscar Santis (Guatemala) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Arquímides Ordóñez.
Goal! Panama 1, Guatemala 1. Carlos Harvey (Panama) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Éric Davis with a cross following a corner.
José Rosales (Guatemala) is shown the yellow card.
Aníbal Godoy (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, Panama 1, Guatemala 1.
Substitution, Guatemala. Rubio Rubín replaces Arquímides Ordóñez.
Substitution, Panama. José Luis Rodríguez replaces Aníbal Godoy.
Second Half begins Panama 1, Guatemala 1.
Substitution, Panama. Tomás Rodríguez replaces José Fajardo.
Substitution, Guatemala. Darwin Lom replaces Óscar Santis.
Substitution, Guatemala. Kevin Ramírez replaces Rudy Muñoz.
